scripts.build:esm: tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.esm.json -f -fe .js && node scripts/finalize-esm.cjs
scripts.build: yarn check:entrypoints && yarn clean && eslint . && yarn generate:abis && yarn build:cjs && yarn build:esm && node scripts/copy-build-assets.cjs
scripts.test:dependency-hygiene: tsc && tsc-alias && node --test tests/cosmos-kit-pruning.test.cjs tests/dependency-contracts.test.cjs tests/dependency-pruning.test.cjs tests/direct-import-contracts.test.cjs tests/elliptic-owner-boundary.test.cjs
